a map appears in a sink full of water
the museum docent knows the future of every painting

the school bell rings one minute before dawn
a neighbor's cat starts waiting for a person who does not live there
the apartment upstairs has no registered tenant but the light is always on
the ferry carries passengers to a shore that was not there yesterday
a tape recording contains a conversation that has not happened yet
